text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh! A campaign to give away official<n>Uma pics, eh?
I gotta repost this ASA—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Th-this can't be... How did I, of all<n>people, fail to
notice something on<n>Umatter that's been reposted
1,254<n>times?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Groan. Reposting now won't do athing besides being a huge humiliationto my Umas...
